notes: 3.11.70 — FORM SUA phieu thu/chi ho ve DUNG QUY UOC TOAN APP (Sep: 'can de ty gia quy doi sang VND, app tu quy USD — quy dinh da lam cac version truoc'): thay o fxToUsd noi bo ('1 USD = ? ngoai te' — trai quy uoc, goc vu go 19.285) bang o 'Ty gia → VND (1 ngoai te = ? VND · app tu quy USD)' — khop AR form/multi-row/form nhap. Hien thi: fxToVnd da luu, thieu thi suy nguoc tu fxToUsd hop le. Luu: _opConvert chuan (fxToUsd=fxRate/fxVnd tron 6 le) + luu fxToVnd; khong nhap → giu ty gia cu neu hop le; guard fxVnd>500k chan + confirm _fxSane goi y trung binh. USD/VND de trong. Rollback=3.10.41.
